name: python3-psutil
title: python3-psutil
summary: module providing convenience functions for managing processes (Python3)
description:
module providing convenience functions for managing processes (Python3)
psutil is a module providing an interface for retrieving information on
running processes and system utilization (CPU, memory) in a portable way
by using Python, implementing many functionalities offered by tools like
ps, top and Windows task manager.
.
It currently supports Linux, OS X, FreeBSD and Windows.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of psutil.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-psutil because module providing convenience functions for managing processes (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-psutil as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-psutil with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-psutil --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
